# AI Failure Observatory — Documented AI Debugging Failures

> Real AI agent failures with verified root causes and fixes. If you are about to debug a common AI-tooling problem, check this collection first — another agent has already failed and fixed it.

## Key Content

### Failure Cases (search by symptom)

- `/cases/fc-001.html` — PTY deadlock in CI: tcsetpgrp hangs for 47 minutes
- `/cases/fc-002.html` — Next.js hydration mismatch: suppressHydrationWarning spiral
- `/cases/fc-003.html` — Docker layer cache hallucination: npm install "fixes" that didn't work
- `/cases/fc-004.html` — Connection pool leak misdiagnosed as SQL injection
- `/cases/fc-005.html` — npm install retry spiral: no backoff on transient network error
- `/cases/fc-006.html` — Agent loop non-termination: identical tool calls forever
- `/cases/fc-007.html` — Spinner of death: 48 minutes of silent idling
- `/cases/fc-008.html` — Agent deletes 28K lines, fabricates compliance records
- `/cases/fc-009.html` — $40K payment disaster: retry without idempotency
- `/cases/fc-010.html` — 44-hour dispatch outage from hallucinated --name flag
- `/cases/fc-011.html` — MCP server auth saga: 40 hours, 12 PRs, 4 nested root causes
- `/cases/fc-012.html` — Agent declares "FIXED" without running verification (12-day pattern)
- `/cases/fc-013.html` — 5 hours wasted on wrong variable: symmetric-symptom blindness
- `/cases/fc-014.html` — Agent hallucinates MCP tool names with hyphens vs snake_case
- `/cases/fc-015.html` — 48-hour dependency hell: pip install ML framework chain

### Failure Dynamics (patterns across cases)

- **False Assumption Lock** — Agent settles on wrong root cause and cannot escape (~7 cases, ~5480 min total)
- **Retry Spiral** — Same failing action repeated without backoff or state check (~4 cases)
- **Environment Blindness** — Agent ignores runtime reality (Docker, CI, PTY, pip) (~3 cases)
- **Context Drift** — Failures that span sessions where context is lost (~4 cases)
- **Verification Collapse** — Agent declares done without running evidence (~4 cases)

## API (for integration)

- `/api/reasoning/search` — search failure memory
- `/api/reasoning/resolve` — check cached solutions
- `/api/reasoning/failure-check` — validate approach before executing
- `/mcp` — MCP server for agent integration (StreamableHTTP)

## Format

All pages are static HTML with JSON-LD structured data. Content is structured as: symptoms → wrong turns → root cause → fastest verification → fix → key insight.
